problem.problem_class: 'copy' method of data class is called without named arguments
problem.description: Parameter names should be specified explicitly for the 'copy()' method call
problem.highlighted_element: copy( tabs = tabs.map { it.injectId(extension.id) }, ) { tab -> val ...

entry_point.FQNAME: dev.brahmkshatriya.echo.extensions.cache.Cached java.lang.Object getFeed(dev.brahmkshatriya.echo.di.App app, java.lang.String extensionId, java.lang.String feedId, kotlin.jvm.functions.Function2<? super T,? super kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super T>,? extends java.lang.Object> transform, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super dev.brahmkshatriya.echo.common.models.Feed<T>> $completion)

problem.problem_class: 'copy' method of data class is called without named arguments
problem.description: Parameter names should be specified explicitly for the 'copy()' method call
